title: ControlChangeFrom
content:
# ControlChangeFrom

Information about the current `resource` data when the the Control Change `payload` is created.


## Properties

- **value** (`any`): Value represented in one of these formats.
- **timestamp** (`string`): UTC time when the current `value` is recorded in the Control Change object, formatted in RFC 3339.
summary: Information about the current `resource` data when the the Control Change `payload` is created.
